requirement.description: When a horn request is received from the instrument cluster, the gateway shall immediately reflect the horn active status on the vehicle network.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify GW reflects horn active when IC horn request = 1.
Verify GW reflects horn inactive when IC horn request = 0.
Verify immediate GW response to rising edge horn request.
test_cases.expected_result: GWS_Horn_Active = 1 in first received GW frame
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_horn_003(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, 0x900, 1)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_gws_horn_active(msgs[0]) == 1

test_cases.test_objective: Verify GW clears horn active after horn request deassertion.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_horn_004(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, 0x900, 2)
    values = [decode_gws_horn_active(m) for m in msgs]
    assert 1 in values and 0 in values

test_cases.test_objective: Verify GW ignores unrelated IC commands.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_horn_005(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, 0x900, 2)
    values = [decode_gws_horn_active(m) for m in msgs]
    assert len(set(values)) == 1

test_cases.test_objective: Verify GW horn status remains valid across repeated messages.
